fields.message:
1. Please fill correctly to enable us understand your requirements and issue a formal offer.									
2. No information shall be disclosed to any third party without the written consent of the customer in conformity with GMCSPL Policy & procedures.

Organization having different processes addressed than above can remove the rows, which are irrelevent and add rows based on the process and provide the details.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ** in case of multi sites, includes temporary site add data in seperate sheet and send along with this form.
